title: ApplyResult
description: Schema for the dict returned by apply_final_mapping(). Transient communication — no embedded schema_namespace/schema_version. DESIGN_APPLY_OPS.md §7.

ok.description: Whether the apply operation succeeded overall.

skipped.description: Entries that were skipped (e.g. hash match, no-op).

errors.description: Fatal error messages. Each string begins with an E_ code.

warnings.description: Non-fatal warning messages. Each string begins with a W_ code.

diagnostics.description: Diagnostic information about the apply execution.

dry_run.description: Whether this was a dry-run (no files modified).
